description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent red gable roof and a large attached garage at the front. The exterior walls are a light beige color, complemented by blue-tinted windows and a white garage door. The property is set on a rectangular green lawn, with a black driveway leading up to the garage and a paved walkway extending to the main entrance. A small, square swimming pool with a light blue interior is situated in the backyard, surrounded by a paved area. The roof includes a small dormer window, adding architectural interest to the otherwise simple design. The overall layout is compact and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story beige bungalow with a red gable roof, attached garage, black driveway, and a backyard swimming pool on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance, black driveway, and the red gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, garage doors, and the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard swimming pool, paved area, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the pool, lawn, and the side of the house with the driveway extending outward.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
